framework.name: AP2 Uses Verifiable Credentials for Agent Identity
framework.description: Mandates are signed by verifiable credentials (VCs), which implies an agent identity layer. However the blog describes VC as proving USER authority, not agent-authenticates-agent. Agent identity verification (gap_6) remains unaddressed — this is user-identity-delegated-to-agent.
framework.raw_quote: These mandates are signed by verifiable credentials (VCs)

source.title: Announcing Agent Payments Protocol (AP2) | Google Cloud Blog
